{{Infobox character
| name = Melerius
| titles = {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|[[Archmage]]}}{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|, Royal Advisor}}
| affiliations = {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[The crown|the crown]]}}
| professions = {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|magical advisor, advisor}}
| appears_in = The Last Horizon
| introduced = [[The Captain (novel)|The Captain]]
}}

''See also: [[Melerius Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|Melerius is an ancient [[Archmage]] who serves as the magical advisor to [[Queen Shyrax]]. He possesses specialized soul magic, which allows him to interact with the Aetheric structure of sentient beings. An elderly man with a beard, he has been known to manifest as a ghostly or intangible presence, and at one point, his spirit was contained within a ring. Throughout his long existence, he has held various roles, including serving as a magical advisor to a royal guard. Melerius is characterized by his scholarly curiosity and deep respect for those with profound insight into the [[Aether]]. He frequently engages in teaching, instructing students at the [[Magic Tower]] and seeking advanced lessons from [[Captain Vallenar]].}}

== The Engineer ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|As an [[Archmage]], Melerius serves as the magical advisor to [[Queen Shyrax]]. He exists by having bound a copy of his consciousness to an artifact, which allows him to manifest as an elderly, bearded human from [[the Queen]]'s ring. His unique magical abilities enable him to interact directly with the Aetheric structure, or soul, of sentient beings. During his interactions, Melerius is able to recognize the narrator's mastery over seven different magics.}}

<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">7</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|[[Melerius]] is Shyrax's magical advisor.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c3">''The Engineer'', chapter 3</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|[[Melerius]] is an [[Archmage]] and advisor to [[Queen Shyrax]].<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c4">''The Engineer'', chapter 4</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|[[Melerius]] is sealed within a ring.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c4" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|[[Melerius]] can manifest as an elderly, bearded human from Shyrax's ring.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c4" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|[[Melerius]]'s magic allows him to interact with the Aetheric structure of sentient beings, often called the soul.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c4" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|[[Melerius]] bound a copy of his consciousness to an artifact.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c4" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|[[Melerius]] is a character who recognizes the narrator's mastery of seven magics.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c5">''The Engineer'', chapter 5</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== The Knight ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">3</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|[[Melerius]] is a character who seeks lessons from the narrator.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c23">''The Knight'', chapter 23</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|[[Melerius]] is an ancient [[Archmage]].<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c24">''The Knight'', chapter 24</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|[[Melerius]] is someone whose opinion can be sought regarding an ominous premonition.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c28">''The Knight'', chapter 28</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== The Pilot ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|Melerius is a ghostly mage and Royal Advisor who serves the crown. Appearing as a translucent, white echo of a wizard wearing a hooded mantle and sporting a long beard, he is able to manifest from a magic ring. Composed of grayish conjurations of the [[Aether]], he expressed admiration for [[Karoshan]] society and clarified that his nature was not a product of [[alchemy]]. Following these observations, he expressed a desire to receive more lessons with [[Captain Vallenar]].}}

<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">7</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[Melerius]] is a ghostly mage and Royal Advisor who can manifest from a magic ring.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c6">''The Pilot'', chapter 6</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[Melerius]] appears as a translucent, white echo of a human wizard with a long beard and hooded mantle.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c6" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[Melerius]] serves the crown.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c6" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[Melerius]] desires more lessons with [[Captain Vallenar]].<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c6" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[Melerius]] is a ghost made of grayish conjurations of the [[Aether]].<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c7">''The Pilot'', chapter 7</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[Melerius]] admires [[Karoshan]] society.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c7" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[Melerius]] stated that it was not [[alchemy]].<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c7" />}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|“I am Archmage Melerius, advisor to Queen Shyrax.”<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c4" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|“Magnificent, their efficiency,” Melerius said, speaking through magical vibrations. “I’ve always admired Karoshan society.”<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c7" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|"But not alchemy," Melerius said with a twinkle in his eye.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c7" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{The Last Horizon nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:The Engineer]]
[[Category:The Knight]]
[[Category:The Pilot]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon characters]]
